zh.Montgomery, Wales: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利 安德 普爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin於大約1200年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利時，他的父親Meredydd AP YR Arglwydd20歲，母親Gwerfil Ap Morgan20歲。他於大約1256年與Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利 安德 普爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1278年在他的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin于大约1200年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利时，他的父亲Meredydd AP YR Arglwydd20岁，母亲Gwerfil Ap Morgan20岁。他于大约1256年与Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利 安德 普爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1278年在他的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Gethin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Gethin, perhaps a soft-mutated form of cethin ‘dusky, swarthy’.

variants.name: Getting
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Gutyn, a pet form of Gruffudd (see Griffith ), mainly found in north Wales.
German: very rare variant of Gettig or Götting (see Goetting ) and, in North America, also an altered form of the latter.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Griffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Gruffud
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin was born about 1200, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, Meredydd AP YR Arglwydd, was 20 and his mother, Gwerfil Ap Morgan, was 20. He married Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen about 1256, in Montgomery and Pool, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1278, in his hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin est né environ 1200, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Meredydd AP YR Arglwydd, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Gwerfil Ap Morgan, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen environ 1256, à Montgomery and Pool, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1278, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.Montgomery, Wales: Montgomery and Pool, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin um 1200 in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Meredydd AP YR Arglwydd 20 und seine Mutter Gwerfil Ap Morgan 20. Er hat um 1256 in Montgomery and Pool, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1278 im Alter von 79 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethinが約1200年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーで生まれた時，父Meredydd AP YR Arglwyddは20歳，母Gwerfil Ap Morganは20歳であった。約1256年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリー アンド ポオルでMargaret verch Rhys of Carmarthenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1278年に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.Montgomery, Wales: 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리 앤드 포
ko.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin(이)가 대략 1200년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Meredydd AP YR Arglwydd(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwerfil Ap Morgan(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1256년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리 앤드 포에서 Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1278년 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Montgomery, Wales: монтгомири анд пул, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin родился около 1200 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Meredydd AP YR Arglwydd было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwerfil Ap Morgan, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen около 1256 г. в местности монтгомири анд пул, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1278 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

Se casó con Margaret verch Rhys of Carmarthen aproximadamente 1256, en Montgomery and Pool, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1278, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.
